command: set -eu; for i in $(seq 1 12); do ORDER_ID=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"alice","item":"sku-003","quantity":1}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' | sed -n 's/.*"order_id":\([0-9][0-9]*\).*/\1/p'); curl -s "http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=alice" >/dev/null; curl -s "http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=sku-003" >/dev/null; if [ -n "$ORDER_ID" ]; then curl -s "http://vuln-app:5000/api/order/$ORDER_ID" >/dev/null; fi; sleep 0.25; done; sleep 2
